title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
summary: A U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt tanker traffic and drive oil prices higher, risking a widening confrontation with China. This geopolitical escalation could deepen global energy instability and lead to dangerous miscalculation.
content: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁可能加深全球最严重能源危机——并冒险犯危险错误
zh.summary: 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁威胁阻止油轮运输并推高油价，面临与中国对抗升级的风险。这种地缘政治升级可能加深全球能源不稳定性并导致危险的误判。

title: Rising fuel costs puts strain on transport charity
summary: A Gloucestershire transport charity must find an additional £20,000 to cover rising fuel costs. The funding shortfall highlights how inflation pressures squeeze nonprofit organizations serving vulnerable populations.
content: A charity in Gloucestershire says it will have to find an extra £20k to cover increased fuel costs.

zh.title: 燃油成本上升给运输慈善机构造成压力
zh.summary: 格洛斯特郡的一家运输慈善机构必须找到额外的20,000英镑来弥补燃油成本上升。资金短缺凸显通胀压力如何挤压为弱势群体服务的非营利组织。

title: From panic to pricing in: Are markets past 'peak fear and sell-off' despite oil price surge?
summary: Market investors appear to have already priced in geopolitical risks associated with the oil surge and are becoming less reactive to headlines. This suggests a potential shift toward stability after initial panic-driven selling.
content: Investors appear to have already priced in much of the geopolitical risks and are growing less reactive to headlines.

zh.title: 从恐慌到定价：尽管油价飙升，市场是否已经度过"最高恐惧和抛售"？
zh.summary: 市场投资者似乎已经将与油价飙升相关的地缘政治风险计入价格，对头条新闻的反应越来越少。这表明在初始恐慌性抛售后可能出现向稳定性转变。

title: European stocks set to start the week lower as Iran peace hopes fade
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower as traders reassess Middle East developments amid fading hopes for peace negotiations. The pullback reflects renewed investor caution about geopolitical risks.
content: European stocks are expected to start the new trading week on a somber note as global traders assess developments in the Middle East.

zh.title: 伊朗和平希望破灭，欧洲股市周一开盘走低
zh.summary: 随着和平谈判希望减弱，交易员重新评估中东局势，欧洲股市预计开盘走低。此跌幅反映出投资者对地缘政治风险的重新谨慎态度。

title: 'School breakfast club has best toast in the world'
summary: A free breakfast club at Lawley Primary serves 120 pupils and students credit it with improving their ability to learn. The program addresses food insecurity while supporting educational outcomes.
content: Up to 120 pupils go to the free club at Lawley Primary and say it helps get them ready to learn.

zh.title: "学校早餐俱乐部拥有世界上最好的吐司"
zh.summary: 劳利小学的免费早餐俱乐部为120名学生服务，学生们认为它提高了他们的学习能力。该项目既解决了粮食不安全问题，又支持了教育成果。

title: Why pressure is mounting at oil giant BP ahead of its annual general meeting
summary: Oil giant BP faces potential shareholder resistance at its upcoming annual general meeting. The mounting pressure reflects investor concerns about the company's strategy and performance.
content: Oil giant BP is bracing for a possible shareholder revolt at its upcoming annual general meeting.

zh.title: 石油巨头BP年度股东大会前压力日益增加的原因
zh.summary: 石油巨头BP在即将召开的年度股东大会上面临潜在的股东反抗。日益增加的压力反映了投资者对公司战略和业绩的担忧。

title: Dow futures drop 500 points after Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade as talks fail: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures fell 500 points after Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following failed diplomatic talks. The sharp reversal erases earlier gains as geopolitical tensions reignite market concerns.
content: All three major averages are coming off their best week since November on hopes that the conflict will soon come to an end.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布霍尔木兹海峡封锁谈判失败后道指期货下跌500点：实时更新
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布因外交谈判失败而封锁霍尔木兹海峡后，美国股指期货下跌500点。这一急剧反转消除了早期涨幅，地缘政治紧张局势重新引起市场担忧。

title: UK could adopt EU single market rules under new legislation
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is proposing legislation allowing the UK government to adopt EU single market rules without parliamentary approval. The move signals a potential shift toward closer post-Brexit regulatory alignment.
content: Sir Keir Starmer is planning a law which will mean that the UK government can adopt EU single market rules, without them being voted on in Parliament.

zh.title: 英国可根据新立法采纳欧盟单一市场规则
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默提议立法，允许英国政府不经议会批准而采纳欧盟单一市场规则。这一举措表明可能向脱欧后更紧密的监管协调方向转变。

title: Trump blasts Pope Leo for criticism of U.S. foreign policy
summary: Pope Leo, the first U.S.-born pope, has condemned Trump's military action against Iran, prompting sharp public criticism from Trump. The clash highlights deep divisions over U.S. military intervention policy.
content: Leo, the first U.S.-born pope who hails from Chicago, has condemned Trump's war effort with Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普猛烈抨击教宗利奥对美国外交政策的批评
zh.summary: 首位美国出生的教宗利奥谴责了特朗普对伊朗的军事行动，引发特朗普的尖锐公开批评。这场冲突突显了在美国军事干预政策上的深刻分歧。

title: Eric Swalwell suspends campaign for California governor amid sexual misconduct allegations
summary: Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell has suspended his California gubernatorial campaign following sexual misconduct allegations from multiple women. The withdrawal reflects intensifying accountability pressures for political candidates.
content: Multiple women have reportedly accused Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell of sexual misconduct, among them a former staffer who alleges he sexually assaulted her.

zh.title: 埃里克·斯瓦韦尔暂停加州州长竞选，面临性不当行为指控
zh.summary: 民主党众议员埃里克·斯瓦韦尔在多名女性提出性不当行为指控后，暂停了他的加州州长竞选。这次退出反映了政治候选人面临的日益加强的问责压力。

title: Move now to seize this potential stock-market crisis and opportunity
summary: Financial advisors recommend preparing lists of stocks and closed-end funds to buy if markets decline further. The guidance frames current market volatility as a potential buying opportunity for investors with available capital.
content: If you have a wish list of stocks or closed-end funds that you have wanted to buy if they go on sale, now is the time to get it ready.

zh.title: 立即采取行动抓住这个潜在的股市危机和机遇
zh.summary: 财务顾问建议准备股票和封闭式基金清单，以便在市场进一步下跌时购买。该建议将当前市场波动框架化为拥有可用资本的投资者的潜在买入机会。

title: Oil jumps above $100 as US to blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
summary: Oil prices surged above $100 after failed U.S.-Iran peace negotiations, prompting the U.S. to move toward blockading Iranian ports. The collapse of talks raises concerns about a deepening global energy crisis and potential impact on worldwide energy costs.
content: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.

zh.title: 和平谈判失败后，美国将封锁伊朗港口，油价飙升至100美元以上
zh.summary: 美国与伊朗和平谈判失败后，油价飙升至100美元以上，促使美国开始封锁伊朗港口。谈判破裂引发了对全球能源危机加剧和全球能源成本影响的担忧。

title: Trump says he’s closing the Strait of Hormuz. Has he been reading MarketWatch?
summary: President Trump announced plans to close the Strait of Hormuz following failed U.S.-Iran negotiations. The move has significant implications for oil markets and investors holding oil stocks during geopolitical tensions.
content: News over the weekend illustrates once again the advantage of having oil stocks in your retirement accounts.

zh.title: 特朗普说他要关闭霍尔木兹海峡。他是在读MarketWatch吗？
zh.summary: 总统特朗普宣布了在美国与伊朗谈判失败后关闭霍尔木兹海峡的计划。此举对石油市场和在地缘政治紧张局势期间持有石油股票的投资者有重大影响。

title: Asia markets open lower as oil surges after U.S. moves to blockade Iran ports
summary: Oil prices surged above $100 following the collapse of U.S.-Iran negotiations and announcement of a U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports. Asian markets opened with losses amid concerns over geopolitical tensions and energy implications.
content: Oil prices surged past $100 after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and Washington moved toward a naval blockade, setting a cautious tone for Asia markets at the open.

zh.title: 美国采取行动封锁伊朗港口后油价飙升，亚洲市场低开
zh.summary: 美国与伊朗谈判破裂和美国宣布对伊朗港口实施海军封锁后，油价飙升至100美元以上。在地缘政治紧张局势和能源影响的担忧中，亚洲市场低开。
